summary: Both flagged fixtures received HTTP 503 with code OPENAI_NOT_CONFIGURED. The Railway service does not have OPENAI_API_KEY set (or it is empty) in its runtime environment.
rerun: After setting OPENAI_API_KEY on the Railway service: BASE_URL=https://ttb-alcohol-label-verifier-production.up.railway.app OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-... npm run eval:primary-latency
